parsed.reason: This message is warm, natural, and authentically parent-voiced. It directly responds to the grandparent's request with genuine enthusiasm ("so good to hear from you"), makes a concrete and deliverable promise (pulling together photos and sending them), includes specific detail ("past few weeks") without overstepping, and closes with warmth ("love you!"). The casual tone ("hi grandma") and conversational style feel genuinely personal, not robotic. It appropriately sets expectations without inventing details or promising things that can't be delivered.
